title: Unit 06 Pretest
description: Diagnostic pretest for Digital Citizenship in Practice.

questions.prompt: What does applying digital citizenship skills involve?

choices.text: Using only one skill at a time
choices.feedback: Digital citizenship requires combining multiple skills.

choices.text: Integrating safety, ethics, communication, and responsibility in decisions
choices.feedback: Correct. Effective digital citizenship requires combining multiple skills.
The goal is responsible use, not avoidance.
Digital citizenship includes behavior and decision-making, not just technical ability.

questions.prompt: When evaluating a real-world online scenario, what is most important?

choices.feedback: Speed does not ensure good decision-making.

choices.text: Considering safety, consequences, and responsible actions
choices.feedback: Correct. Strong decisions require evaluating risks and outcomes.
Peer behavior does not always lead to safe decisions.
Avoidance does not solve problems.

questions.prompt: Effective digital collaboration requires clear communication and shared responsibility.

choices.feedback: Correct. Collaboration depends on communication and accountability.
Successful collaboration requires both communication and responsibility.

questions.prompt: Which action best supports effective online collaboration?

choices.text: Completing all work without communicating with others
choices.feedback: Collaboration requires communication.
Ignoring expectations disrupts teamwork.

choices.text: Communicating clearly and contributing fairly to group work
choices.feedback: Correct. Effective collaboration involves communication and shared effort.
Participation is essential in collaboration.

questions.prompt: What is a key part of digital wellness?

choices.feedback: Unlimited use can negatively affect well-being.

choices.text: Balancing screen time with other activities
choices.feedback: Correct. Balance is essential for healthy technology use.
Wellness focuses on balance, not avoidance.

choices.text: Using multiple devices at the same time
choices.feedback: Multitasking can increase stress and reduce focus.

questions.prompt: A student feels overwhelmed by constant notifications. What is the best response?

choices.text: Ignore the feeling and continue as usual
choices.feedback: Ignoring stress does not address the issue.

choices.text: Adjust settings and set boundaries for device use
choices.feedback: Correct. Managing notifications supports digital wellness.
Increased checking can increase stress.
Balance, not extreme action, is the goal.

questions.prompt: Digital citizenship skills are only useful in school settings.

choices.feedback: Digital citizenship applies to real-world situations beyond school.
Correct. These skills apply across personal, academic, and professional contexts.

questions.prompt: Which question best supports creating a responsible digital action plan?

choices.feedback: Ease does not determine responsibility.

choices.text: What actions reflect safe, respectful, and responsible behavior?
choices.feedback: Correct. Responsible planning considers safety, respect, and impact.

choices.text: What will others expect me to do?
choices.feedback: Decisions should be based on responsibility, not pressure.

choices.text: What takes the least amount of time?
choices.feedback: Time is not the key factor in responsible decision-making.
